summary: Admin Pricing Configuration (God Mode) testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Admin Dashboard Pricing tab, Pricing Editor with 5 roles, Admin/God Mode links in Sidebar and Settings.
critical_code_review_comments: pricing_config.py correctly implements DEFAULT_PRICING_DATA with all 5 roles: surfer ($0/$5/$10), grom ($0/$3/$8), photographer ($18/$30), grom_parent ($0/$5/$10), hobbyist ($0/$5)
Admin endpoints properly verify is_admin flag before allowing access
Pricing versioning system works correctly - each update increments version
AdminDashboard.js correctly includes Pricing tab in tabs array (line 171)
AdminPricingEditor.js displays all 5 role tiers with editable prices and features
Sidebar.js shows Admin and God Mode links for admin users (lines 389-420)
Settings.js shows Admin Tools card with Admin Dashboard and God Mode buttons for admin users (lines 847-877)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Pricing Configuration fully tested. Key files: /app/backend/routes/pricing_config.py (pricing CRUD endpoints), /app/frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPricingEditor.js (pricing editor UI), /app/frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.js (admin dashboard with Pricing tab). Pricing grid: Surfer ($0/$5/$10), Grom ($0/$3/$8), Photographer ($18/$30), Grom Parent ($0/$5/$10), Hobbyist ($0/$5). Credit rate: 1:1 ($1 = 1 credit).

GET_subscriptions_config.details: Returns dynamic pricing data with all 5 roles, credit_rate=1, currency=USD

GET_admin_pricing_config.details: Returns pricing with metadata (version, updated_at, is_from_db) for admin users

POST_admin_pricing_update.details: Updates pricing configuration and increments version

admin_dashboard_pricing_tab.details: Pricing tab visible in Admin Dashboard tabs

pricing_editor_5_roles.details: All 5 role tiers displayed: Surfer, Grom, Photographer, Grom Parent, Hobbyist

sidebar_admin_link.details: Admin link visible in Sidebar for admin users

settings_admin_tools.details: Admin Tools card with Admin Dashboard and God Mode buttons visible in Settings
